title: Smoky Kiwifruit Ethiopian Stir-fry
description: This monsoon-inspired dish features crisp kiwifruits mixed with a smoky flavor profile to create a unique vegetarian-friendly stir-fry.
instructions: Prepare the kiwifruit by slicing it into thin pieces.
Finely chop the garlic and onion.
In a wok or large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onions to the heated oil and cook until they turn translucent.
Next add sliced kiwifruits and sauté for about 2 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Pour in tomato paste and smoked paprika, stirring well to combine with the ingredients.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Optionally, you can add fresh herbs at this stage for added flavor.
Stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes until kiwifruits are tender but not mushy.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice for a complete meal.
